# Sabiha Aamir — AI Content Creator & Prompt Engineer

Portfolio of Sabiha Aamir, an AI Content Creator and Prompt Engineer specializing in cinematic digital storytelling, advanced AI workflows, and media automation. Currently pursuing a Bachelor's in Artificial Intelligence at KFUEIT.

## Professional Summary
Bridging the gap between raw code and visual storytelling to build cinematic digital universes.

## Key Skills
- Artificial Intelligence
- Prompt Engineering
- Media Automation
- Digital Storytelling
- Futuristic Digital Aesthetics
- Frontend Development

## Contact
- Portfolio: https://sabiha-swart.vercel.app
- Available for Freelance, Brand Collaborations, and Remote work.
